level_signals: Desire to do individual contributor product management work
Comp range $194K-$239K base consistent with Senior/Staff IC at Airbnb

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience, ideally in building platforms and campaign based marketing technology or ads /promotions systems.
must_haves.qualifier: ideally in platforms and campaign-based marketing technology or ads/promotions systems

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with AI automation in campaign management.
Track record of driving incremental revenue and scaling global programs.
Entrepreneurial experience of taking an idea to reality.
Demonstrated track record of building cross-functional and executive leadership alignment.
Desire to do individual contributor product management work.
Due to the nature of this position, the successful applicant will need to be based in San Francisco, CA to be able to conduct their work.

explicitly_excluded: Alaska, Indiana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, South Dakota, Wisconsin, Alabama, Mississippi, Oklahoma, Delaware, Rhode Island

scope.surface: Global campaign-based merchandising platform powering discovery and promotion across Homes, Services, Experiences, Hotels, and new verticals across all app and engagement channels
core_responsibilities: Lead the product vision, strategy, and platform roadmap that supports the merchandising needs of key business verticals (e.g. Homes, Services, Experiences, International) and new bets (e.g. Hotels, Luxe, Partnerships)
Build and scale a flexible, configurable platform for rapid testing and deployment of merchandising formats and offers/incentives.
Incorporate the latest AI technologies to automate targeting, creative asset generation, and campaign management.
Define and measure campaign performance, revenue lift, and guest engagement.
Partner with creative and operations teams to manage campaign calendars, assets, and global coordination.
Efficiently execute to ship products and deliver impact for our business and users.

compensation.equity_form: equity and bonus mentioned as potentially eligible

green_flags: Clear product surface with well-defined scope across Airbnb's verticals
Bonus and equity mentioned in addition to base
Explicit IC orientation stated — no people management expected
AI automation is a key lever, indicating forward-looking mandate
red_flags: Hard requirement to be physically based in San Francisco, CA — eliminates remote candidates
Large list of excluded US states adds friction for relocation candidates
Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for international candidates
8+ years is a high bar with no indication of flexibility

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and 8+ years requirement)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated as KPIs)
ambiguities: The 8+ years requirement says 'ideally in building platforms and campaign based marketing technology or ads/promotions systems' — 'ideally' suggests preference, but the requirement is listed under 'Your Expertise' without a separate nice-to-have section, so treated as hard.
Excluded state list is noted as 'continuously being updated', meaning eligibility may change post-fetch.
Equity and bonus eligibility is described as 'may also be eligible' — not guaranteed.
